steps.title: Identify the population represented by the sample
steps.content:
The sample consists only of largemouth bass, so any inference about weight applies specifically to that group, not to all fish in the pond.
Therefore we can estimate the proportion of largemouth bass weighing more than 2 pounds from the sample proportion of 30%.

steps.title: Evaluate answer choices
steps.content:
Choice D states that approximately 30% of all largemouth bass in the pond weigh more than 2 pounds, which matches the inference from the sample.
Choices A, B, and C refer to all fish or average weight, which the sample does not support.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
